title: INF-9 Subquadratic UI (model loading + state-vector controls + variant badge)
goal: Subquadratic UI in Inference Lab: model loader scoped to SSM/RWKV variants, state-vector controls (commit/restore/persist/rehydrate), variant badge (Mamba2 / RWKV v5 / v6 / v7). Hidden via capabilities.supportsSubquadratic == false.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES + AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE. SubquadraticPanel.svelte: variant badge (Mamba2/RWKVv5/v6/v7) prominent; state-vector controls section (commit current state, list of saved states with name + timestamp + bytes, restore selected, persist to disk, rehydrate from disk); subquadratic-specific config (e.g., n_layer, d_state read-only display from model config). Hidden via capability gate. Operator can opt out of subquadratic UI via a Work Profile flag (settings.ui.show_subquadratic_panel) if they're not yet using SSMs.
risk_if_missed: Operator cannot interact with SSM state vectors through UI.
validator_focus: Hidden when unsupported; variant badge prominent; opt-out Work Profile flag honoured.

implementation_record.ipc_binding: app/src/lib/ipc/subquadratic.ts (135 lines): camelCase DTOs for 6 IPC channels + SUBQUAD_VARIANT_LABELS
implementation_record.panel_component: app/src/components/inference_lab/SubquadraticPanel.tsx (140 lines): supportsSubquadratic capability gate, variant badge, Work Profile opt-out checkbox (settings.ui.show_subquadratic_panel via localStorage)
implementation_record.controls_component: app/src/components/inference_lab/StateVectorControls.tsx (245 lines): commit input, restore/persist/rehydrate buttons, occupancy display, evict-all with confirm dialog, MT-117 deferral banner
implementation_record.registration: InferenceLab.tsx + index.ts updated (1 import + 1 export + 1 panel slot each — same pattern as MT-091 LoraStackComposer + MT-094 KvCachePanel + MT-110 SpeculativeDecodingPanel)
implementation_record.svelte_to_tsx_drift: Owned files contract listed SubquadraticPanel.svelte + StateVectorControls.svelte + stores/subquadratic.ts; app stack is React/TSX so files landed as .tsx + lib/ipc/subquadratic.ts. Same defect class as MT-091/094/098/102/105/110/112.
implementation_record.variant_detection_decision: LoadedModelRuntime does not yet carry the SSM variant (the variant-aware loader is a follow-on MT alongside MT-112). The panel accepts an optional `variant?: SubquadVariant` prop and falls back to 'Subquadratic (variant detection pending)' when unset. InferenceLab.tsx passes no variant for now; will plumb through once the IPC schema extends.
implementation_record.work_profile_opt_out: settings.ui.show_subquadratic_panel persisted via localStorage as the interim store (Work Profile IPC bridge is a separate MT). 'false' = panel hidden even on capable models. Toggle visible in the panel header. Default 'true' (visible) for capable models.

test_results.vitest_subquadratic_panel: 10 tests PASS — capability gate (3), variant badge (2), opt-out toggle, commit/restore round-trip, empty-token rejection, MT-117 persist deferral banner, MT-117 rehydrate deferral banner, evict-all confirm cancellation

edits_made.change: +1 import line + 4-line panel registration block (matches the exact pattern of MT-091/094/110 panel registrations)
edits_made.why_unavoidable: Without the registration the new SubquadraticPanel is never rendered. Same defect class as previous UI MTs.
The barrel file exports inference_lab panels; the new panel needs to appear there for parity with the other panels.

edits_avoided: Variant lookup IPC (LoadedModelRuntime.variant): deferred to a follow-on MT alongside the variant-aware loader. Panel renders 'variant detection pending' fallback for honest UX without an IPC migration here.
Work Profile IPC bridge (settings.ui.show_subquadratic_panel): localStorage interim store. The proper Work Profile IPC is a separate MT track.
MT-117 disk persistence: persist/rehydrate buttons wired to the deferred IPC channels with friendly tooltip banners rather than backend error strings. Buttons activate the moment MT-117 ships.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Variant badge correct for loaded model.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: Subquadratic UI panel + state-vector controls land with capability gating, variant badge, Work Profile opt-out, and explicit MT-117 deferral banners on persist/rehydrate buttons. 10 vitest tests PASS. Concerns: (a) Svelte-to-React/TSX drift — owned_files contract names .svelte components but app stack is React/TSX so files landed as .tsx + lib/ipc/subquadratic.ts (acknowledged drift, same class as MT-091/094/098/102/105/110/112 — repeat across the WP); (b) variant detection deferred — LoadedModelRuntime does not yet carry SSM variant, panel shows 'variant detection pending' fallback; (c) opt-out flag stored in localStorage rather than the Work Profile IPC bridge.

Concerns: (a) Svelte-to-React/TSX drift — owned_files contract names .svelte components but app stack is React/TSX so files landed as .tsx + lib/ipc/subquadratic.ts (acknowledged drift, same class as MT-091/094/098/102/105/110/112 — repeat across the WP); (b) variant detection deferred — LoadedModelRuntime does not yet carry SSM variant, panel shows 'variant detection pending' fallback; (c) opt-out flag stored in localStorage rather than the Work Profile IPC bridge.
